DP.178.0000:
Ah, you timed your arrival well.\f
I’ve just finished reading a book,
you see.\f
Allow me to introduce myself.\f
I am Lucian.
I am a user of the Psychic type.\f
I must say, you’ve already proven
yourself to be outstanding\r
by coming this far.\f
They say I am the toughest of the
Elite Four.\f
I’m afraid I will have to go all out
against you to live up to that\r
reputation.\f
DP.178.0001:
Congratulations.
You’ve now beaten the Elite Four.\f
However, that doesn’t mean you’re
done with the Pokémon League.\f
There remains the Champion.\f
I should warn you--the Champion is
far stronger than the Elite Four.\f
Now, go on. Step through the
doorway to your final battle.
DP.178.0002:
I’ll be reading books until the next
challenger arrives.\f
That will calm my nerves, so that
I may deal with all situations without\r
panicking.
